candidate.title: Iluvatar Zhikai 50 and Zhikai 100 accelerator catalog field promotion

identity_keys.title: Iluvatar Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150
identity_keys.boundary: Parent-11 duplicate-boundary row only; not modified by this run-local task.

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local Iluvatar Zhikai capture found and reused: raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-iluvatar-zk100/20260628T060649509748Z-www-iluvatar-com-productdetails-9cf9c89ce3.md. The 20260627 capture has the same content hash and is duplicate/refresh evidence. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Before this run-local task, curated pages represented parent-11 Iluvatar Tiangai 100/150 as structured rows and represented Iluvatar ZK50 / ZK100 only as a raw comparison row in Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison. No curated page represented distinct structured Zhikai 50 or Zhikai 100 rows.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, and AI Infra Coverage Map. No standalone Iluvatar Zhikai page was needed.
local_checks.structured_catalog_scan: Before this run-local task, data/compute_accelerators/skus/sample-skus.yaml had iluvatar-tiangai-100 and iluvatar-tiangai-150 only; observations/sample-observations.yaml and resolved/sample-resolved-specs.yaml had no iluvatar-zhikai-50, iluvatar-zhikai-100, MR-V50, or MR-V100 rows.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Parent-11 intentionally promoted only Iluvatar Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150. Parent-1 through parent-18 and continuation task manifests promoted Corigine, SGLang supplements, Yusur, H200, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda evidence, Resnics N2025, NVIDIA confidential inference, Asterfusion, Kunlunxin R200/R200-8F, Iluvatar Tiangai, MetaX C-series/C600, Huawei Atlas 300I A2, JaguarMicro Yunxiao DPU, July 8/9 SGLang batches, AWS Trn2 aggregate memory, and NVIDIA BlueField-4. They did not promote Iluvatar Zhikai 50/100 structured catalog facts.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: Parent-11 lists Tiangai 100 and Tiangai 150 identity keys and explicitly treats Zhikai 50/100 as adjacent non-promoted Iluvatar family context.
Before this run-local task, Iluvatar ZK50 / ZK100 was present as one raw comparison row with visible form, memory, power, and interface text, but no resolved-spec citation or distinct SKU rows.
No pre-existing iluvatar-zhikai-50 or iluvatar-zhikai-100 SKU rows; this task adds one SKU per source-visible card variant and leaves Tiangai rows unchanged.
No pre-existing Zhikai observations; this task adds only form_factor, memory_capacity, memory_type, host_interface, and tdp observations for Zhikai 50 and Zhikai 100.
No pre-existing Zhikai resolved fields; this task adds resolved fields pointing to the new Zhikai observations only.
Existing iluvatar-zk100-product-page source registry entry was reused and clarified to cover both Zhikai 50 and Zhikai 100 because the local page table lists both cards.
This task records Zhikai 50/100 evidence while preserving parent-18 BlueField-4 and parent-11 Tiangai evidence as current duplicate-boundary state.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained an official product-specific Iluvatar Zhikai capture with a table that maps form factor, HBM2E memory capacity/type, PCIe Gen4.0 x16 host interface, and board power to Zhikai 50 / MR-V50 and Zhikai 100 / MR-V100. Those source-visible schema-supported fields were only present as raw comparison evidence and had not been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

schema_boundary.source_value: The product table lists Zhikai 50 as half-length half-height single-slot PCIe, 75 W, 16 GB HBM2E, and MR-V50; it lists Zhikai 100 as full-length full-height single-slot PCIe, 150 W, 32 GB HBM2E, and MR-V100.
schema_boundary.boundary: Resolved only form_factor, memory_capacity, memory_type, host_interface, and tdp for the two distinct card rows.

schema_boundary.source_value: The table lists PCIe as PCle Gen4.0 X 16 lane.
schema_boundary.boundary: Recorded as the normalized host_interface string PCIe Gen4.0 x16 lane while preserving the source locator and notes.

schema_boundary.source_value: The page says the cards support FP32, FP16, INT8 mixed-precision inference.
schema_boundary.boundary: No fp32_tflops, fp16_tflops, int8_tops, benchmark, throughput, ranking, or production-operation field is resolved because the source does not expose exact schema-compatible performance values.

schema_boundary.source_value: The page states 128-channel video decode, H.264/H.265/VP9/AVS2 support, JPEG decode/encode rates, CUDA ecosystem compatibility, mainstream framework support, average migration-time reduction, 2-3x actual-use performance, 800+ instructions, cost positioning, and application scenarios.
schema_boundary.boundary: These claims remain curated boundary text only and are not catalog facts, codec-capacity fields, ecosystem-completion proof, benchmarks, production-operation evidence, service SLOs, cost facts, or rankings.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Iluvatar Tiangai 100 or Tiangai 150 structured row was changed.

No Zhikai FP32, FP16, INT8, video/image codec capacity, CUDA ecosystem compatibility, migration-time, performance-ratio, instruction-set, application-scenario, cost, benchmark, production-operation, service-SLO, ranking, or aggregate-system claim was promoted.

No BlueField, SGLang, AWS Trn2, JaguarMicro, Atlas 300I A2, MetaX, Kunlunxin, Asterfusion, Yusur, Resnics, Corigine, Cambricon, H200, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, data/RAG, observability, governance, cost, or network/storage row was modified except duplicate-boundary context.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
